hintDisplay: Sujeto: mis padres / Verbo: ayudar (pasado perfecto → resultado presente) / Complemento: con la reunión familiar / Tiempo: ahora

correctSentence: If my parents had saved money years ago, they would be helping me with the family reunion now.
